full_content: Deliberation Archive record DELIB-0879: GTKB-ISOLATION-002 completed the detailed Phase 2 project root and repository topology plan for GT-KB/application separation. The plan compares parent workspace, sibling repositories, common workspace with separate repositories, monorepo, submodule/subtree, and package-only options; recommends separate GT-KB and application repositories with package/service consumption and an optional common workspace folder only as a human organization container; defines Codex, Claude Code, VS Code, CI, git, worktree, and submodule policies; specifies root-boundary verification tests; and defines the non-destructive Agent Red migration rehearsal shape.
explicit_change_request: Owner approved proceeding with GTKB-ISOLATION-002 after completion of the Phase 1 authority matrix plan, to take advantage of current session context and define the project root and repository topology plan.
change_reason: Archive the completed GTKB-ISOLATION-002 project root and repository topology planning deliverable.
